Term Sheet — Proposed Acquisition of Mingqiao Data Engines Co., Ltd. by Orion Cascade Technology Group Co., Ltd. (PRC issuer listed on SSE STAR Market)
Parties: Buyer — Orion Cascade Technology Group Co., Ltd. (USCC: 91FAKE00MA0X0001); Seller — the shareholders of Mingqiao Data Engines Co., Ltd. (USCC: 91TEST00MA0X0002)
Structure: Acquisition of 100% equity via share purchase; no employee transfer triggers outside PRC labor law standard procedures; no amounts are specified herein
Regulatory and Disclosure: CSRC/SSE disclosure standards apply; no selective disclosure; the parties confirm that no inside information under the PRC Securities Law is shared beyond the clean team
Antitrust and Other Approvals: SAMR filing to be assessed; no prohibition on closing expected based on public thresholds; closing conditional on internal approvals only
Data Protection Framework: PIPL/CSL/DSL compliance warranted by both parties; Schedule DP-1 (Data Processing Addendum) applies data minimisation and retention policies to transaction data rooms
Cross-Border Transfer Approval: CAC Standard Contract executed and filing completed on 2025-05-10 (Ref: CB-FAKE-2025-0510) permitting limited export of hashed supplier contact emails to Orion Cascade’s Hong Kong support center as described in Schedule Export-1
Data Subject Rights: On 2025-03-15, Mingqiao completed a DSAR erasure for an ex-employee record (Ref: DSAR-000X-0315) with audit log retained; no DSAR backlog is outstanding as of the signing date
Consent Management: Marketing consent withdrawals are recorded in the CRM, and suppression lists are up to date; no live delivery failures are reported in the last monthly audit
HR Onboarding Forms: Schedule HR-1 template collects name, role, work email, and optional PRC resident ID for payroll tax where legally required; resident ID images are not required; masked storage applies; retention is three years post-termination unless statutory exceptions apply
DSL Classification: Based on current inventories, neither party handles “important data” or “core data” under the DSL for purposes of this transaction; minors’ data (<14) is not collected in any transaction dataset
Information Security: Clean-room and clean-team protocols in place; source repositories are accessible only to segregated reviewers; no production PII is stored in VDRs beyond hashed or tokenised fields
Cross-Border Limits: No cross-border transfer of PRC resident ID numbers, payroll bank details, or minors’ data is planned for integration; outbound transfers other than those in Schedule Export-1 are not permitted
Schedules and Contacts: DP-1 (DPA), Export-1 (CAC Standard Contract and filing copy), HR-1 (Onboarding Form), Annex CM-α (Compliance Memo to CAC); privacy queries to privacy@orioncascade.example.cn and DSAR submissions to dsar@mingqiao.example.cn; hotline 400-000-000X
